content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is down with IT leading losses (-3.49%), VIX elevated at 19.25 (+3.55%), and all sectors red. Book is already 72% deployed with limited headroom (only INR 76K remaining deployable). Priority is managing the 9 existing positions — specifically trailing SLs on winners and tightening risk on losers — rather than adding fresh exposure in a volatile tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "At CMP 76.20 vs entry 81.50, down -6.5% but thesis intact — Q4 PAT +35% YoY, NII +19%, CASA 52.5%, analyst targets Rs 88-90. Current SL 75.00 is only ~1.6% below CMP. Keeping SL as-is; if it triggers, exit cleanly. No room to tighten further without getting stopped on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op check — current SL already at entry (984) which is breakeven. Wait, current SL is already at 984 (breakeven). No change needed. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1395.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blockbuster (+27% PAT, +23% revenue, 26.3% EBITDA margin). Stock near 52w high with momentum intact. Trailing SL up from 1385 to 1395 to tighten risk below today's intraday low (1409) with some buffer. Unrealized P&L only +0.4% so not yet at the +2% breakeven trigger — but given extended 3-day rally (+11%), tightening SL is prudent to lock in margin of safety on pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Stock at/near 52w high 1059, up +0.7% entry. Q4 results Apr 27 is a binary event risk — trading window shut. Tightening SL from 1040 to 1045 (~1.1% below CMP) to reduce downside into results. Any disappointment on CASA/margins could produce a sharp move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high (694 vs 696 high), P&L +0.6%. Current SL 675 is ~1.5% below CMP — already tight. Q4 results Apr 29 is upcoming catalyst. No change needed; SL is well-placed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.3%, CMP 2341 vs entry 2372. Current SL 2260 is ~3.5% below CMP — appropriate given Q4 results Apr 30 could produce volatility. Thesis (FMCG defensive + rural recovery + results catalyst) intact. Not tightening further to avoid getting stopped on pre-earnings noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.0%. Current SL 388 is ~3.1% below CMP. Thesis (summer peak demand, renewable COD, Q4 results May 15) intact. No action needed; SL provides reasonable buffer."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 230,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock trades ~20% ABOVE consensus target of Rs 177. JM Financial expects Q4 PAT to decline ~12.3% YoY at Apr 29 concall — material sell-on-news risk. Parabolic +35% April rally at 52w high has blow-off-top characteristics. Today's intraday reversal (high 216.87, now 212.56) and bearish engulfing/doji patterns on the daily confirm exhaustion. Taking small -0.4% loss rather than hold into a likely negative earnings catalyst 5 days away. Power cluster exposure (NTPC + ADANIPOWER) also argues for trimming."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2%. Defensive hedge against VIX 19.25 and Iran/Hormuz tail risk. Current SL 119 is ~3.7% below CMP. Gold retraced on US-Iran ceasefire progress but structural hedge thesis intact. Hold without changes."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at 75 (~1.6% below CMP). Strong Q4 fundamentals support holding through near-term PSU bank weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (984 = entry). No further tightening needed; let winner run toward Rs 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; keep wider SL given VIX and geopolitical optionality."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1395.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-Q4 blockbuster rally; tightening SL to lock in margin of safety."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high with Q4 results Apr 27 — tightening SL ahead of binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.00,
      "reasoning": "Already tight SL at 675 (~1.5% below CMP). Q4 results Apr 29 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "SL provides reasonable buffer into Apr 30 earnings. Don't tighten prematurely."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 388 is well-placed ~3.1% below CMP. Hold through summer demand thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Parabolic rally at 52w high, ~20% above consensus target, Q4 results Apr 29 expected to show PAT decline. Sell before the event."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DRREDDY: Canada semaglutide DINs catalyst but rally already front-ran approval; wait for pullback or confirmation of Health Canada approval. ATUL: Board results TODAY — binary event, pass until after the print. ICICIBANK: Strong Q4 (NNPA 0.33%, loan +15.8%) but banking sector weak; watch for a bounce off Rs 1320 support. OFSS: Massive volume spike and dividend catalyst Rs 270/share record May 7, but stock already gapped up and IT sector in rout — watch. HUDCO, ABSLAMC, COCHINSHIP, EMCURE, CLEAN: interesting relative strength but book is near max deployment — need to free up capital first.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 72% deployed with INR 275K cash. Net cumulative P&L still effectively flat (-0.21%). Losing ADANIPOWER removes power cluster over-concentration and frees ~INR 49K. No new entries today given (1) cautious market tone with VIX +3.55%, (2) hysteresis rule with book >60% deployed and negative unrealized today, and (3) cluster of earnings events in next week (AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — keeping cash dry for post-event opportunities. Focus this session is defensive: trailing SLs on NESTLEIND/AUBANK and cutting ADANIPOWER."
}
